channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal keep title hopes alive with win over Crystal Palace as West Ham struggle near relegation zone
item.description: Arsenal have continued their strong push in the Premier League title race after a hard-fought 2-1 victory against Crystal Palace on Sunday, May 24, 2026. The win keeps their championship ambitions ali...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club closure debate raises concerns over heritage institutions and India's global image
item.description: The opinion piece discusses the ongoing controversy surrounding the Delhi Gymkhana Club and the implications of its potential closure. The author, a retired IPS officer, argues that the club has becom...

item.title: Winnipeg police to ride public transit alongside passengers to improve safety
item.description: Winnipeg police are taking steps to increase visibility and improve safety on the city’s public transit system by joining passengers during their daily commutes. The initiative involves officers ridin...

item.title: Abia Governor Alex Otti to privately fund ecumenical centre in Umuahia
item.description: Abia State Governor, Alex Otti, don talk say he go personally fund the construction of a new ecumenical centre in Umuahia, without using any money from the state government. The governor made this kno...

item.title: Call to curb hate speech and political violence ahead of the upcoming elections
item.description: The editorial raises concern over growing political tension in Kenya as the country moves closer to the next General Election, expected in August next year. It warns that early signs of unrest are alr...

item.title: Piastri misses points finish in Canadian Grand Prix as Antonelli wins fourth straight race
item.description: Oscar Piastri endured a disappointing outing at the Canadian round of the 2026 motorsport season, finishing outside the points positions. Despite expectations heading into the race, Piastri was unable...

item.title: Human rights groups raise concerns over immigration enforcement during 2026 FIFA World Cup in the U.S.
item.description: Human rights advocates are expressing concern over the potential impact of immigration enforcement policies during the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will be hosted across 11 cities in the United...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns win second CAF Champions League title after defeating AS FAR 2-1 on aggregate
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns secured their second CAF Champions League crown after drawing 1-1 with AS FAR in Rabat and winning the final 2-1 on aggregate. The South African side defended their narrow 1-0 first-...

item.title: Maki, Jarren, and KD perform “Nangungulila” together on ASAP XP
item.description: ABS-CBN featured a special musical collaboration on “ASAP XP” as singer Maki performed the hit song “Nangungulila” together with Jarren Garcia and KD. The performance became one of the highlighted ent...

item.title: Industry leaders and Google grapple with rapidly evolving AI security risks and infrastructure gaps
item.description: The article explores the rapidly evolving challenges of AI security, highlighting how even major technology companies like Google are still adapting to new threats. In an interview, Google Cloud COO F...

item.title: Goat Prices Increase in Dar es Salaam Ahead of Eid al-Adha Celebrations
item.description: Goat prices in Dar es Salaam have increased sharply as the city moves closer to the upcoming Eid al-Adha celebrations. The rise in prices has been observed across several livestock markets in the comm...

item.title: Controversy grows around Cockroach Janta Party amid police protection, political reactions, and Supreme Court petition
item.description: The online meme-based outfit known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) has become the centre of a growing national controversy involving politics, law enforcement, and social media influence. Founded b...

item.title: Antonelli extends Formula 1 title lead after Russell retires during dramatic Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: Kimi Antonelli secured his fourth consecutive Formula 1 victory at the Canadian Grand Prix after an intense and controversial battle with Mercedes team-mate George Russell. The two drivers exchanged t...

item.title: US stock market gains diverge sharply from declining consumer sentiment, highlighting widening economic inequality
item.description: A widely shared financial graphic highlighted by The Kobeissi Letter has drawn attention to a growing divergence in the U.S. economy between Wall Street performance and household sentiment. Using data...

item.title: Antonelli secures fourth consecutive win as Russell retires from Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: Kimi Antonelli extended his remarkable Formula One run by claiming his fourth consecutive victory at the Canadian Grand Prix after Mercedes teammate and title rival George Russell was forced to retire...

item.title: Nova Scotia sets by-election for newly created Acadian riding in Cape Breton
item.description: Nova Scotia Premier Tim Houston has officially called a by-election for June 23 in the newly established provincial electoral district of Chéticamp-Margarees-Pleasant Bay, located in western Cape Bret...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Canadian Grand Prix after Russell’s engine failure
item.description: Kimi Antonelli delivered a dramatic victory at the Canadian Grand Prix in Montreal, securing his fourth consecutive Formula 1 win after Mercedes teammate George Russell was forced to retire due to eng...

item.title: TNT Tropang 5G signs Chris McCullough as new import for the PBA Commissioner’s Cup
item.description: TNT Tropang 5G has officially tapped former NBA player Chris McCullough as its new import for the ongoing PBA Season 50 Commissioner’s Cup. The announcement was reported by ABS-CBN News on May 24, 202...

item.title: eThekwini city manager outlines progress and long-term development strategy for Durban
item.description: eThekwini Municipality city manager Musa Mbhele has defended his leadership amid criticism, arguing that Durban has undergone steady improvement in service delivery, infrastructure development, and in...

item.title: Rescue operations continue after building collapse in Angeles City leaves 2 dead and 18 missing
item.description: A serious building collapse in Angeles City has left at least two people confirmed dead and 18 others still missing, prompting ongoing rescue operations that have now entered their second day. Emergen...
